match.userMessage:
Macro close-up locked frame on lipstick tube half-buried in wet sand at shoreline. Gentle waves recede slowly across foreground sand, smoothing the surface and leaving glistening trails. Direct flash delivers a sharp punch of light across the coral cap with each subtle water movement. Eye-level macro lens holds tight framing with shallow depth of field isolating the product against softly blurred ocean horizon.

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves receding on sand at dusk. soft water lapping and receding.
